backstory.original: Extremely elderly for a Tortle, Gromma Nander grew discontent with her secluded life after giving birth to her offspring. Once they were old enough to fend for themselves, she ventured back out into the world to learn as much as she could about the strange creatures that inhabit it. Gromma is a wise and inquisitive Tortle who is quick to friendship but slow to trust. She carries a pouch of smooth colored stones that she has collected on her journey and walks with the aid of a battle-worn spear.
backstory.display: 作为一名极其年长的龟人，格罗玛·南德尔在生下后代后，开始对她的隐居生活感到不满。一旦后代们长大到可以自己照顾自己，她就冒险回到这个世界，尽可能多地了解居住在这个世界上的奇怪生物。格罗玛是一名聪明而好奇的龟人，她很快就能交到朋友，但要花很长时间才会信任他人。她带着一袋在旅途中收集的光滑彩色石头，并用一把久经沙场的长矛当作拐杖走路。

description.original: Gromma Nander, moving faster than you would expect for an 80 year old Tortle, stabs the closest enemy with her spear.
description.display: 格罗玛·南德尔以完全不像 80 岁老龟人的迅捷速度刺出长矛，攻击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Gromma summons a wall of stone, knocking enemies back and blocking their movement.
description.display: 格罗玛召唤一面石墙，击退敌人并阻止敌人移动。

longDescription.original: A wall of stone bursts up out of the ground under a random enemy. The targeted enemy and any enemies in the column that the wall appears in take damage and are knocked backwards. The wall lasts for 15 seconds, and for that time enemies cannot pass it.
longDescription.display: 从一名随机敌人脚下的地面召唤出一面石墙，目标敌人和与墙处于同一列的所有敌人会受到伤害并被击退。石墙持续 15 秒，在此期间敌人无法穿过墙壁。

description.original: Gromma increases the damage of all heroes proportional to their age. The younger they are, the greater the effect.
description.display: 格罗玛根据阵型中其他勇士的年龄为他们提高伤害：年纪越轻，加成越高。

description.desc: Gromma increases the damage of all other heroes proportional to their age. The buff starts applying to each Champion at $(amount)%, and for every 10 years younger than 100 that Champion is, the buff on them is increased by $(buff_amount___2)%, stacking multiplicatively.
格罗玛根据阵型中所有其他勇士的年龄为他们提高伤害。此增益从 $(amount)% 开始应用于每个勇士，勇士每比 100 岁年轻 10 岁，其增益就会提高 $(buff_amount___2)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Gromma increases the damage of other champions in the formation based on their age; the younger they are, the greater the buff.
tipText.display: 格罗玛根据阵型中其他勇士的年龄提高其伤害：年纪越轻，加成越大。

description.desc: Gromma increases the damage of $gromma_circle_of_the_mountain_target Champions (on the Good/Evil axis) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each enemy that has spawned and boss enrage stack in the current area, stacking multiplicatively and capping at 100.
对于区域内刷新的每个敌人和每一层首领的“激怒”堆叠，格罗玛均使$gromma_circle_of_the_mountain_target勇士（以善良/邪恶划分时）的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，上限为 100。

specializationDescription.original: Gromma now supports $gromma_circle_of_the_mountain_target champions with mountain might as the enemies grow in number.
specializationDescription.display: 随着敌人数量的增加，格罗玛现在通过山岭之力支持$gromma_circle_of_the_mountain_target勇士。

description.desc: Gromma gains the Debuff role and now casts Sleet Storm on enemies she attacks, causing her targeted enemy, and all nearby enemies, to take $amount% additional damage from all attacks.
格罗玛获得“减益”角色定位，并且现在对她攻击的敌人施放“雪雨暴”，使目标敌人及其附近所有敌人在所有攻击中额外受到 $amount% 的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Gromma now casts Sleet Storm when she attacks, causing enemies near her target to take additional damage.
specializationDescription.display: 格罗玛现在会在攻击时施放雪雨暴。使目标附近的敌人受到额外伤害。

description.desc: Gromma's damage is increased by $(amount)% of the highest Grandmotherly Love buff she's applying to another Champion in the formation.
格罗玛的伤害提高，数值相当于她为阵型中其他勇士施加的“长者关爱”最高增益的 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Gromma now increases her own damage based on her buff of the youngest Champion in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 格罗玛现在会根据阵型中最年轻勇士的增益来提高她自己的伤害。

description.desc: Gromma has a hardened shell, reducing the overwhelm damage she takes from all sources by 25%.
格罗玛获得硬化甲壳，使她受到的所有击溃伤害降低 25%。

tipText.original: Gromma's hard shell reduces the overwhelm damage she takes from all sources by 25%.
tipText.display: 格罗玛的硬化甲壳，使她受到的所有击溃伤害降低 25%。

description.desc: Increases the Health of all other Champions by $amount% of $source's Max Health
提升其他所有勇士的生命值，数值相当于$source最大生命值的 $amount%
The effect of Grandmotherly Love is increased by $amount% for each Champion in the formation younger than Gromma, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位比格罗玛年轻的勇士，均使“长者关爱”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。
Increases the effect of Hardened Shell by $amount%. Enemies that attack Gromma are impaled by her spiked shell, instantly taking $(amount___2) seconds of BUD damage.
“硬化甲壳”的效果提高 $amount%。攻击格罗玛的敌人会被她带刺的甲壳刺穿，立即受到 $(amount___2) 秒基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Gromma casts Stoneskin, increasing her durability and causing her spiked shell to deal damage to attacking enemies.
specializationDescription.display: 格罗玛施放石肤术，提高她的耐力，并使她的尖刺外壳对发动攻击的敌人造成伤害。

description.desc: Gromma gains the Control role and the effect of her chosen Circle specialization is increased by $amount%, and enemies damaged by Gromma have their movement speed and attack speed halved.
格罗玛获得控制者角色，她选择的法阵专精效果提高 $amount%，受到格罗玛伤害的敌人的移动速度和攻击速度减半。

specializationDescription.original: Gromma supplements her abilities with the Entanglement spell, slowing enemies in writhing roots and increasing the effect of her first specialization choice.
specializationDescription.display: 格罗玛使用纠缠术作为辅助技能，利用扭动的根须来减缓敌人的速度，并提高她第一个专精选择的效果。

description.desc: Replaces Gromma's base attack with Melf's Acid Arrow, changing her into a magic attacker. After hitting its target the arrow explodes, damaging its target and all nearby enemies for an additional $(amount___2) seconds of BUD damage.
将格罗玛的基本攻击替换为“马友夫强酸箭”，使她成为魔法攻击者。击中目标后，强酸箭爆炸，对目标及其附近所有敌人额外造成 $(amount___2) 秒基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Gromma now casts Melf's Acid Arrow as her base attack, dealing additional damage in an area.
specializationDescription.display: 格罗玛现在会施放马友夫强酸箭作为基本攻击，造成额外的范围伤害。。

description.original: Whether with the spear or with magic, I will eventually strike true.
description.display: 无论是用矛还是魔法，我最终都会命中。

description.original: Well, savage is a strong word. I prefer thoughtful.
description.display: 好吧，野蛮这个词太过分了。我更喜欢说是“深思熟虑”。

description.original: I'll protect all of my children.
description.display: 我会保护好我所有的孩子。

description.original: Whatever needs to be done will be done.
description.display: 我们终将成功。

description.original: This ol' shell can take a few more knocks.
description.display: 这个老龟壳还能承受几次敲击。

description.original: Just don't tip me over.
description.display: 别把我弄翻了。

description.original: I may not have the sharpest mind, but it's plenty sharp enough.
description.display: 我也许没有最敏锐的思维，但它已经足够锐利了。

description.original: Ha! I like that drawing - go ahead and pin that one to my shell.
description.display: 哈！我喜欢那幅画，去把它钉在我的甲壳上。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each pigment applied to $source, stacking additively

description.original: It's nothing I haven't faced before.
description.display: 没什么是我没见过的。

description.original: Watch out, Squiddly. They're hiding a dagger behind their back.
description.display: 注意咯，斯奎迪。他身后藏着一把匕首。

description.original: I give all my wisdom to those willing to listen.
description.display: 我愿意把我的所有知识都教给那些愿意聆听的人。

description.original: Slow and steady, that's the way.
description.display: 慢而稳，就那这样。

description.original: Stand back; G'ma Gromma's got this one.
description.display: 退后，交给格罗玛奶奶。

description.original: A shell is nature's way of saying, 'Not today, arrows!'
description.display: 贝壳是大自然表达“小箭箭啊，今天不行！”的方式

description.original: Some times a half-shell doesn't cut it.
description.display: 有的时候，半个壳阻止不了。

description.original: Oh, go on, just open the presents - read the card later.
description.display: 来吧，先打开礼物，以后再看贺卡。

description.original: I just think a birthday cake should be a foot taller than who it's for.
description.display: 我认为生日蛋糕应该比寿星高一点。

description.original: Look how far you've come - you're nearly as old as I am!
description.display: 瞧瞧你这些年的成就——你就快和我一样老了！

effects.description: Increases the base value of Grandmotherly Love's stacking bonus by 80%

description.original: I like runnin' with the youngins - my age group can't keep up!
description.display: 我喜欢和年轻人同行。同龄人可跟不上我！

description.original: Just need to stretch a bit, and then I'll win this race.
description.display: 只需要稍微舒展一下，我就能赢得这场赛跑。

description.original: Oh, I suppose you kids have been good enough - to the candy store!
description.display: 哦，看来你们这些孩子都很乖——去糖果店吧！

effects.description: Change buff target for Circle of the Mountain to Good Champions

description.original: Where are we going today? Doesn't matter, I've got the spells for it.
description.display: 今天要去哪里？无所谓，我都能施法。

description.original: Judge me not by my age - I'll still whoop your butt!
description.display: 不要以年龄取龟——我依然能抽烂你的屁股！

description.original: An assortment of random pebbles from my journeys.
description.display: 这是我在旅程中所收集的一些小石头。

description.original: Some polished stones that caught my eye.
description.display: 这是我很喜欢的一些磨光的小石头。

description.original: A considerable collection of colorful calcite.
description.display: 个人收藏的色彩缤纷的方解石。

name.display: 精挑细选的原始小石头

description.original: I've collected a single pebble from each beach I've visited in my travels.
description.display: 每次我到海滩时都会收集一粒小石头。

description.original: It's more for show. These old bones don't fight as well as they used to.
description.display: 表演意义甚于实际用途。这些陈旧的骨头已经没多少威力了。

description.original: Held together with wax and sap and a short length of leather.
description.display: 依靠蜡和树液和皮带来稳固着的长矛。

description.original: Danger lies around every corner these days.
description.display: 这年头危险无处不在。

name.display: 长途跋涉之大师级长矛

description.original: It doubles as a walking staff when the danger is past.
description.display: 在没有战斗时可充当拐杖使用。

description.original: Full of knick-knacks from another time.
description.display: 充斥着很久以前收集的小饰品。

description.original: The leather has been softened by years of use.
description.display: 多年的使用逐渐软化了皮革。

description.original: This pouch has seen me through countless adventures.
description.display: 这个袋子见证了我无数次的冒险。

description.original: There always seems to be something in this pouch to point me in the right direction.
description.display: 这个袋子似乎有种神奇的力量总会指引我走向正确的方向。

description.original: If I move too quickly, it could shatter. I'd better move slowly, then.
description.display: 如果我动作太快，它可能会碎掉。那我还是慢慢移动好了。

description.original: The warm waters off the coast of Ahoyhoy are perfect for collecting discarded coral.
description.display: 哎嚯嚯海岸的暖水海很适合收集珊瑚。

description.original: A special headdress crafted by one of my many offspring.
description.display: 这是某位子孙为我打造的特殊头饰。

description.original: A gift from the first of my grandchildren to leave the compound and explore the lands.
description.display: 我的第一位离开家乡出外闯荡的孙子送给我的礼物。

description.original: Its days are numbered.
description.display: 它的时日无多了。

description.original: You can hear the ocean if you put it up to your ear.
description.display: 把它放在耳朵旁隐约能听见海洋的声音。

description.original: This large conch is older than I am, and I'm practically ancient.
description.display: 这个巨型海螺比我还要年长，我本身就已经很老了。

name.original: Spiked Conch of the Deep Ocean

description.original: Recovered from the slimy tentacles of a slain Marine Decapus.
description.display: 这是从某个死去的十腕章鱼的触角上找到的。

description.original: Covered in itchy, scratching sand.
description.display: 上面充斥着磨人的沙粒。

description.original: A single, brilliant pearl makes this bracelet worth wearing.
description.display: 一粒明亮的珍珠让此手镯蓬荜生辉。

description.original: Crafted for me by a young human during a recent visit to Port Nyanzaru.
description.display: 这是我某次前往南扎路港时某位年轻人为我打造的。

name.original: Solemn Bone Bracelet of the Wind

description.original: If you put your ear up to the pearl, you can hear the approach of strong storms.
description.display: 倚着手镯上的珍珠倾听，隐约能感受到狂风暴雨的逼近。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Tortle Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Lawful Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Extremely elderly for a Tortle, Gromma Nander grew discontent with her secluded life after giving birth to her offspring. Once they were old enough to fend for themselves, she ventured back out into the world to learn as much as she could about the strange creatures that inhabit it. Gromma is a wise and inquisitive Tortle who is quick to friendship but slow to trust. She carries a pouch of smooth colored stones that she has collected on her journey and walks with the aid of a battle-worn spear.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Gromma can be used as a tank, support, or dps Champion based on your specialization choices.

event_upgrades.name: Grandmotherly Love
event_upgrades.description: Gromma increases the damage of all heroes proportional to their age. The younger they are, the greater the effect.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 作为一名极其年长的龟人，格罗玛·南德尔在生下后代后，开始对她的隐居生活感到不满。一旦后代们长大到可以自己照顾自己，她就冒险回到这个世界，尽可能多地了解居住在这个世界上的奇怪生物。格罗玛是一名聪明而好奇的龟人，她很快就能交到朋友，但要花很长时间才会信任他人。她带着一袋在旅途中收集的光滑彩色石头，并用一把久经沙场的长矛当作拐杖走路。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 基于你的专精选择，格罗玛可以作为坦克、辅助或输出型勇士来使用。

event_upgrades.name: 长者关爱
event_upgrades.description: 格罗玛根据阵型中其他勇士的年龄为他们提高伤害：年纪越轻，加成越高。

original.description: Gromma Nander, moving faster than you would expect for an 80 year old Tortle, stabs the closest enemy with her spear.

display.tip_text: 格罗玛的硬化甲壳，使她受到的所有击溃伤害降低 25%。

display.name: 长者关爱
display.tip_text: 格罗玛根据阵型中其他勇士的年龄提高其伤害：年纪越轻，加成越大。

display.name: 极地之环
display.specialization_description: 格罗玛现在会在攻击时施放雪雨暴。使目标附近的敌人受到额外伤害。

original.name: Circle of the Swamp
original.specialization_description: Gromma now increases her own damage based on her buff of the youngest Champion in the formation.

display.name: 沼泽之环
display.specialization_description: 格罗玛现在会根据阵型中最年轻勇士的增益来提高她自己的伤害。

original.name: Stoneskin
original.specialization_description: Gromma casts Stoneskin, increasing her durability and causing her spiked shell to deal damage to attacking enemies.

display.name: 石肤术
display.specialization_description: 格罗玛施放石肤术，提高她的耐力，并使她的尖刺外壳对发动攻击的敌人造成伤害。

original.name: Entanglement
original.specialization_description: Gromma supplements her abilities with the Entanglement spell, slowing enemies in writhing roots and increasing the effect of her first specialization choice.

display.name: 纠缠术
display.specialization_description: 格罗玛使用纠缠术作为辅助技能，利用扭动的根须来减缓敌人的速度，并提高她第一个专精选择的效果。

original.name: Melf's Acid Arrow
original.specialization_description: Gromma now casts Melf's Acid Arrow as her base attack, dealing additional damage in an area.

display.name: 马友夫强酸箭
display.specialization_description: 格罗玛现在会施放马友夫强酸箭作为基本攻击，造成额外的范围伤害。。

original.name: Skilled
original.description: Whether with the spear or with magic, I will eventually strike true.

display.name: 技艺精湛
display.description: 无论是用矛还是魔法，我最终都会命中。

original.name: Savage Attacker
original.description: Well, savage is a strong word. I prefer thoughtful.

display.name: 野蛮攻击者
display.description: 好吧，野蛮这个词太过分了。我更喜欢说是“深思熟虑”。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: I'll protect all of my children.

display.name: 无私
display.description: 我会保护好我所有的孩子。

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: Whatever needs to be done will be done.

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 我们终将成功。

original.name: Tough
original.description: This ol' shell can take a few more knocks.

display.name: 坚韧
display.description: 这个老龟壳还能承受几次敲击。

original.name: Resilient
original.description: Just don't tip me over.

display.name: 韧性
display.description: 别把我弄翻了。

original.name: Defensive Duelist
original.description: It's nothing I haven't faced before.

display.name: 防守型决斗者
display.description: 没什么是我没见过的。

original.name: Keen Mind
original.description: I may not have the sharpest mind, but it's plenty sharp enough.

display.name: 敏锐思维
display.description: 我也许没有最敏锐的思维，但它已经足够锐利了。

original.name: Group Elder
original.description: Watch out, Squiddly. They're hiding a dagger behind their back.

display.name: 团队长老
display.description: 注意咯，斯奎迪。他身后藏着一把匕首。

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: I give all my wisdom to those willing to listen.

display.name: 浪荡的首领
display.description: 我愿意把我的所有知识都教给那些愿意聆听的人。

original.name: Weapon Master
original.description: Slow and steady, that's the way.

display.name: 武器大师
display.description: 慢而稳，就那这样。

original.name: Heavily Armored
original.description: A shell is nature's way of saying, 'Not today, arrows!'

display.name: 重甲
display.description: 贝壳是大自然表达“小箭箭啊，今天不行！”的方式

original.name: Full Shell
original.description: Some times a half-shell doesn't cut it.

display.name: 完整外壳
display.description: 有的时候，半个壳阻止不了。

original.name: Power From Art
original.description: Ha! I like that drawing - go ahead and pin that one to my shell.

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each pigment applied to $source, stacking additively

display.name: 艺术的力量
display.description: 哈！我喜欢那幅画，去把它钉在我的甲壳上。

effects.description: 对$source施加的每种颜料均使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%，以加算方式堆叠

original.name: Calm Under Pressure
original.description: Stand back; G'ma Gromma's got this one.

display.name: 从容应对
display.description: 退后，交给格罗玛奶奶。

original.name: Birthday Gifts
original.description: Oh, go on, just open the presents - read the card later.

display.name: 生日礼物
display.description: 来吧，先打开礼物，以后再看贺卡。

original.name: Birthday Cakes
original.description: I just think a birthday cake should be a foot taller than who it's for.

display.name: 生日蛋糕
display.description: 我认为生日蛋糕应该比寿星高一点。

original.name: Rite of Passage
original.description: Look how far you've come - you're nearly as old as I am!

effects.description: Increases the base value of Grandmotherly Love's stacking bonus by 80%

display.name: 成人仪式
display.description: 瞧瞧你这些年的成就——你就快和我一样老了！

effects.description: “长者关爱”堆叠加成的基础值提高 80%

original.name: Staying Young
original.description: I like runnin' with the youngins - my age group can't keep up!

display.name: 永葆青春
display.description: 我喜欢和年轻人同行。同龄人可跟不上我！

original.name: Still Spry
original.description: Just need to stretch a bit, and then I'll win this race.

display.name: 老当益壮
display.description: 只需要稍微舒展一下，我就能赢得这场赛跑。

original.name: Traveling Circles
original.description: Where are we going today? Doesn't matter, I've got the spells for it.

display.name: 旅行结社
display.description: 今天要去哪里？无所谓，我都能施法。

original.name: Taunt
original.description: Judge me not by my age - I'll still whoop your butt!

display.name: 嘲讽
display.description: 不要以年龄取龟——我依然能抽烂你的屁股！

original.name: Good Kids
original.description: Oh, I suppose you kids have been good enough - to the candy store!

effects.description: Change buff target for Circle of the Mountain to Good Champions

display.name: 好孩子
display.description: 哦，看来你们这些孩子都很乖——去糖果店吧！

effects.description: 将山岭之环的增益目标更改为善良勇士

original.name: Random Pebbles
original.description: An assortment of random pebbles from my journeys.

display.name: 乱七八糟的小石头
display.description: 这是我在旅程中所收集的一些小石头。

original.name: Polished Pebbles
original.description: Some polished stones that caught my eye.

display.name: 磨光的小石头
display.description: 这是我很喜欢的一些磨光的小石头。

original.name: Colorful Stones
original.description: A considerable collection of colorful calcite.

display.name: 缤纷的小石头
display.description: 个人收藏的色彩缤纷的方解石。

original.name: Carefully Collected Pristine Pebbles
original.description: I've collected a single pebble from each beach I've visited in my travels.

display.name: 精挑细选的原始小石头
display.description: 每次我到海滩时都会收集一粒小石头。

original.name: Dull Spear
original.description: It's more for show. These old bones don't fight as well as they used to.

display.name: 迟钝的长矛
display.description: 表演意义甚于实际用途。这些陈旧的骨头已经没多少威力了。

original.name: Damaged Spear
original.description: Held together with wax and sap and a short length of leather.

display.name: 破损的长矛
display.description: 依靠蜡和树液和皮带来稳固着的长矛。

original.name: Sharpened Spear
original.description: Danger lies around every corner these days.

display.name: 尖锐的长矛
display.description: 这年头危险无处不在。

original.name: Masterful Spear of Long Journeys
original.description: It doubles as a walking staff when the danger is past.

display.name: 长途跋涉之大师级长矛
display.description: 在没有战斗时可充当拐杖使用。

original.name: Old Pouch
original.description: Full of knick-knacks from another time.

display.name: 陈旧的袋子
display.description: 充斥着很久以前收集的小饰品。

original.name: Soft Leather Pouch
original.description: The leather has been softened by years of use.

display.name: 柔软的皮袋
display.description: 多年的使用逐渐软化了皮革。

original.name: Well Traveled Leather Pouch
original.description: This pouch has seen me through countless adventures.

display.name: 饱经风霜的皮袋
display.description: 这个袋子见证了我无数次的冒险。

original.name: Sacred Pouch of the Wayfinder
original.description: There always seems to be something in this pouch to point me in the right direction.

display.name: 开拓者之神圣袋子
display.description: 这个袋子似乎有种神奇的力量总会指引我走向正确的方向。

original.name: Delicate Headdress
original.description: If I move too quickly, it could shatter. I'd better move slowly, then.

display.name: 精美的头饰
display.description: 如果我动作太快，它可能会碎掉。那我还是慢慢移动好了。

original.name: Coral Headdress
original.description: The warm waters off the coast of Ahoyhoy are perfect for collecting discarded coral.

display.name: 珊瑚头饰
display.description: 哎嚯嚯海岸的暖水海很适合收集珊瑚。

original.name: Braided Headdress
original.description: A special headdress crafted by one of my many offspring.

display.name: 镶边头饰
display.description: 这是某位子孙为我打造的特殊头饰。

original.name: Intricate Headdress of the Grandmother
original.description: A gift from the first of my grandchildren to leave the compound and explore the lands.

display.name: 祖母的精致头饰
display.description: 我的第一位离开家乡出外闯荡的孙子送给我的礼物。

original.name: Fragile Conch
original.description: Its days are numbered.

display.name: 脆弱的海螺
display.description: 它的时日无多了。

original.name: Hearty Conch
original.description: You can hear the ocean if you put it up to your ear.

display.name: 健壮的海螺
display.description: 把它放在耳朵旁隐约能听见海洋的声音。

original.name: Ancient Conch
original.description: This large conch is older than I am, and I'm practically ancient.

display.name: 古老的海螺
display.description: 这个巨型海螺比我还要年长，我本身就已经很老了。

original.name: Spiked Conch of the Deep Ocean
original.description: Recovered from the slimy tentacles of a slain Marine Decapus.

display.name: 深海带刺海螺
display.description: 这是从某个死去的十腕章鱼的触角上找到的。

original.name: Sandy Bracelet
original.description: Covered in itchy, scratching sand.

display.name: 含沙的手镯
display.description: 上面充斥着磨人的沙粒。

original.name: Single Pearl Bracelet
original.description: A single, brilliant pearl makes this bracelet worth wearing.

display.name: 单颗珍珠手镯
display.description: 一粒明亮的珍珠让此手镯蓬荜生辉。

original.name: Dual-Banded Bracelet
original.description: Crafted for me by a young human during a recent visit to Port Nyanzaru.

display.name: 双链手镯
display.description: 这是我某次前往南扎路港时某位年轻人为我打造的。

original.name: Solemn Bone Bracelet of the Wind
original.description: If you put your ear up to the pearl, you can hear the approach of strong storms.

display.name: 风声之庄重骨头手镯
display.description: 倚着手镯上的珍珠倾听，隐约能感受到狂风暴雨的逼近。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
阵型中每有一位勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
使所有女性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Tortle Champions by $(amount)%
使所有龟人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有魅力大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 13 or higher by $(amount)%
使所有感知大于等于 13 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Lawful Champions by $(amount)%
使所有守序阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
